name: Towards an Automated Test of LLM Security Knowledge
summary: arXiv:2607.18496v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for a range of software, hardware and human-centered security tasks. Consequently, LLM performan...
description: arXiv:2607.18496v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for a range of software, hardware and human-centered security tasks. Consequently, LLM performance on security tasks is an active area of measurement and research, often with a focus on identifying areas in which LLM security ``knowledge'' may be insufficient. Popular strategies for identifying...
author: Shufan Chai, Liangliang Sun, Jessica Staddon
